title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 22 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 22 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 22 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 22/02/2022
Feb 22nd, 2022 CFR Qingdao, USD/dry tonne DCE iron ore futures market falling trends by 0.07%.the main contract closed 684.5. Thequotation in the morning was increased by 10-20 yuan/mt over yesterday. Some traders refused to sell goods easily.
